![Private Residences](https://storage.kempinski.com/cdn-cgi/image/w=1920,f=auto,fit=scale-down,g=auto/ki-cms-prod/images/7/8/6/5/19345687-1-eng-GB/b29b04607b35-Final-Jewel-Box-Rendering.jpg)

# Private Residences

Kempinski Residences Miami Design District

##### Where European Elegance Meets Miami Energy

At the crossroads of art, fashion and waterfront living, Kempinski Residences Miami Design District redefines residential luxury living in one of the world’s most creative cities - an intimate expression of European luxury in a distinctly Miami setting.

Rising across two elegant towers, the collection includes 132 private residences, six townhomes and 17 guest suites reserved exclusively for residents. Expansive terraces open onto uninterrupted views of Biscayne Bay and the city skyline, blurring the line between indoors and out.

The architecture is bold yet fluid, shaped by light, space and a deep connection to the surrounding urban energy. Interiors blend refined materials with contemporary lines, creating residences that feel both sophisticated and effortlessly livable.

![Final Porte - cochere Rendering.jpg](https://storage.kempinski.com/cdn-cgi/image/w=960,f=auto,fit=scale-down,g=auto/ki-cms-prod/images/1/9/6/5/19345691-1-eng-GB/6b4b299d64b7-Final-Porte-cochere-Rendering.jpg)

![Final Dead - on Rendering.jpg](https://storage.kempinski.com/cdn-cgi/image/w=1920,f=auto,fit=scale-down,g=auto/ki-cms-prod/images/5/9/6/5/19345695-1-eng-GB/720a8a28a9d3-Final-Dead-on-Rendering.jpg)

Life here is effortless. Kempinski’s signature service culture brings discreet daily management, personalised attention and a hospitality mindset that anticipates every detail.

Wellness, dining and social spaces unfold across spa and fitness areas, pools, lounges and private salons, creating a refined, sensual lifestyle shaped by design, service and pleasure.

For more information about this opportunity, please click below.

Contact Us

![Final Jewel Box Rendering.jpg](https://storage.kempinski.com/cdn-cgi/image/w=1920,f=auto,fit=scale-down,g=auto/ki-cms-prod/images/7/8/6/5/19345687-1-eng-GB/b29b04607b35-Final-Jewel-Box-Rendering.jpg)

# Kempinski Residences Miami Design District

3801 & 3883 Biscayne Blvd Miami FL 33137

Kempinski Residences Miami Design District is the first standalone Kempinski-branded residential collection in the United States, introducing a refined European standard of luxury to Miami. Developed by DaGrosa Capital Partners LLC, the project features two architecturally striking 23-story towers, each with just 66 residences (only four units per floor), for a total of 132 condominium residences. Kempinski Residences Miami Design District will also include six townhomes and 17 guest suites reserved exclusively for residents. The architecture is designed by internationally acclaimed firm Arquitectonica, with interiors by Rockwell Group and landscape architecture by Enea. Both towers are being developed simultaneously and connected by an elevated amenities bridge, creating a cohesive yet intimate residential enclave in the heart of the Miami Design District.

## Residence Features

The residences at Kempinski Residences Miami Design District offer spacious two- to four-bedroom [floor plans](https://www.miamicondoinvestments.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Kempinski-Residences-Miami-Floor-Plans-All.pdf) ranging from approximately 2,100 to over 3,100 square feet, with an average residence size of 2,514 square feet (see [Kempinski Residences Miami Design District floor plans](https://www.miamicondoinvestments.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Kempinki-Residences-Miami-Floor-Plans.pdf "Kempinski Residences Miami Design District floor plans")). All homes are corner residences with private elevator access, expansive terraces (many exceeding 500 square feet), and panoramic views of Biscayne Bay, the Miami skyline, and the Design District. Each tower has duplex penthouses starting on the 22nd floor. Interiors are thoughtfully curated by Rockwell Group and feature custom European cabinetry, premium Gaggenau appliance packages with built-in coffee systems and induction cooktops, spa-inspired primary bathrooms with Kallista fixtures and Kohler smart toilets, and floor-to-ceiling glass that maximizes light and views.

## Amenities & Services

Approximately 70,000 square feet of indoor and outdoor amenities are distributed across both towers and seamlessly connected. The North Tower is dedicated to health and wellness, offering a state-of-the-art fitness center, treatment rooms, spa facilities, wellness café, kids’ room, garden lounge, and an 85-foot lap pool with cabanas and sun shelf. The South Tower focuses on social and entertainment amenities, including a beverage bar, business center, conference room, game room, golf simulator, music studio, private dining room, children’s and teen lounges, and a TV lounge. Outdoor amenities include a beach-entry pool, splash pad, padel court, lawn sports area, outdoor theatre, social lounge, and games lounge. Residents will also enjoy assigned parking, guest suites, townhomes, retail offerings at the base, and a dedicated house car for each tower—along with the elevated service standards associated with the Kempinski brand.

## Kempinski Residences Miami Design District Pricing & Deposit Schedule

Pricing at Kempinski Residences Miami Design District starts from $3.7 million for two-bedroom residences, with three-bedroom homes starting from $4.65 million, and four-bedroom residences from $5 million. The deposit structure includes a $50,000 reservation, 20% at contract (60–90 days), 10% at groundbreaking (anticipated Q2 2027), 10% at top-off (anticipated Q2 2028), and the remaining 60% due at closing (anticipated Q4 2029).

## Kempinski Residences Miami Design District Location

Kempinski Residences Miami Design District will be located at 3801 & 3883 Biscayne Boulevard, just steps from the heart of the [Miami Design District](https://www.miamicondoinvestments.com/miami-design-district-condos "Miami Design District"). Residents will be within walking distance of world-renowned luxury boutiques, contemporary art galleries, public art installations, and Michelin-starred dining destinations. By car, the property offers convenient access to Wynwood, Midtown Miami, Edgewater, Miami Beach, and Brickell, as well as Miami International Airport. Positioned between Biscayne Bay and one of Miami’s most prestigious cultural and retail neighborhoods, Kempinski Residences Miami Design District blends global luxury branding with one of the city’s most dynamic urban settings.
